description: Collaboration & Sharing — invitation flow, collaborator management, read-only link sharing, visibility modes, and multi-user awareness.

userStories.title: Invitation REST API
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need REST endpoints for sending invitations, accepting/declining invitations, revoking invitations, and re-inviting after decline.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/invitations/:id/accept accepts invitation (invitee only, creates idea_collaborators)
Re-inviting after decline creates new pending invitation
Visibility transitions to 'collaborating' on first accept
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/api-design.md § Collaboration Endpoints, docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § collaboration_invitations, idea_collaborators, ideas.visibility
Testing: docs/04-test-architecture/test-matrix.md § API-INVITE.01-05, T-8.1.01
Files: services/gateway/apps/collaboration/views.py, serializers.py, urls.py, tests/test_invitation_api.py
Gotchas: Use transaction.atomic() for visibility transition + collaborator creation. Check collaborator count before visibility update.

userStories.title: Collaborator Management API
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need REST endpoints for listing collaborators, removing collaborators, transferring ownership, and leaving ideas.
acceptanceCriteria: Single owner cannot leave without transfer (400)
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/api-design.md § Collaboration Endpoints, docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § ideas.owner_id, co_owner_id
Testing: docs/04-test-architecture/test-matrix.md § API-COLLAB.01-04, T-8.4.01-02
Files: services/gateway/apps/collaboration/views.py, tests/test_collaborator_mgmt.py
Gotchas: Single-owner constraint: co_owner_id IS NULL. Transfer updates owner_id, previous owner becomes collaborator.

test_cases: T-8.4.01-02 | Unit | Single owner constraint, co-owner leave

userStories.title: User Directory Search API
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need a user directory search endpoint for the invite flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Min query length 2 chars (400 if shorter)
Max 20 results, ordered by display_name ASC
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/api-design.md § User Search, docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § users
Testing: docs/04-test-architecture/test-matrix.md § API-USERS.01-03
Files: services/gateway/apps/authentication/views.py (users owned by auth), tests/test_user_search.py
Gotchas: Use Q(display_name__icontains=...) | Q(email__icontains=...). Exclude request.user.id.

test_cases: API-USERS.01-03 | API | Search by name/email, min length

userStories.title: Read-Only Link Sharing API
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need endpoints for generating read-only share links and validating share link access.
acceptanceCriteria: Middleware validates ?token= query param, adds 'share_link_viewer' role
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/api-design.md § Share Link, docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § ideas.share_link_token
Testing: docs/04-test-architecture/test-matrix.md § API-SHARE.01-02, T-8.3.01-02
Files: services/gateway/apps/ideas/views.py, services/gateway/middleware/share_link.py (new), tests/test_share_link.py
Gotchas: Token: secrets.token_hex(32). Middleware adds 'share_link_viewer' to user.roles for read-only enforcement.

userStories.title: Visibility Mode Transitions
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need to implement automatic visibility mode transitions when collaboration state changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Removing all collaborators does NOT revert to 'private'
Visibility field read-only (cannot be manually set)
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § ideas.visibility
Testing: docs/04-test-architecture/test-matrix.md § T-8.1.01-02
Files: services/gateway/apps/collaboration/views.py (accept_invitation — add transition), services/core/apps/collaboration/tests/test_visibility.py
Gotchas: Transition ONLY on first accept. Check IdeaCollaborator.count() before insert. Use transaction.atomic().

data_model: ideas: visibility varchar CHECK(private/collaborating) default private
test_cases: T-8.1.01-02 | Unit | Default private, transition on first accept, no revert

userStories.title: CollaboratorModal Frontend
userStories.description: As a user, I want a collaborator management modal with invite search, collaborator list, pending invitations, and transfer ownership.
acceptanceCriteria: Invite tab: search (debounced 300ms), results, invite button
Collaborators tab: list with remove/transfer actions
Pending tab: list with revoke button
userStories.notes:
Design: docs/03-design/component-inventory.md § CollaboratorModal, docs/03-design/component-specs.md § 17 Modal
Testing: docs/04-test-architecture/test-matrix.md § UI-COLLAB.01-04
Files: frontend/src/components/collaboration/CollaboratorModal.tsx (new), frontend/src/api/collaboration.ts (new), frontend/src/__tests__/collaborator-modal.test.tsx
Gotchas: Nested Dialog for transfer confirmation. TanStack Query invalidateQueries(['collaborators', ideaId], ['invitations', ideaId]).

test_cases: UI-COLLAB.01-04 | Integration | Modal tabs, invite, remove, transfer

userStories.title: Invitation Display — Banner & Card
userStories.description: As an invitee, I want to see my pending invitations on the landing page and as a banner in the workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page shows InvitationCard with inviter, idea, accept/decline
Workspace shows InvitationBanner when pending invite exists for current idea
Accept/decline calls API, removes invitation, shows toast
userStories.notes:
Design: docs/03-design/component-inventory.md § InvitationCard, InvitationBanner, docs/03-design/component-specs.md § 11.5 Banners
Testing: docs/04-test-architecture/test-matrix.md § UI-INVITE.01-03, T-12.3.01
Files: frontend/src/components/landing/InvitationCard.tsx (enhance), frontend/src/components/workspace/InvitationBanner.tsx (new), frontend/src/__tests__/invitation-display.test.tsx
Gotchas: InvitationCard exists (static) — wire API. Banner: AnimatePresence slide-down, border-l-4 border-primary.

test_cases: UI-INVITE.01-03 | Integration | Card/banner render, accept, decline

userStories.title: Read-Only View Mode
userStories.description: As a user accessing an idea via share link, I want to see the workspace in read-only mode with no edit controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Read-only mode hides: chat input, board toolbar, edit actions
userStories.notes:
Design: docs/01-requirements/features.md § F-8.3, docs/03-design/page-layouts.md § 7 Workspace
Testing: docs/04-test-architecture/test-matrix.md § UI-SHARE.01-02, T-8.3.03-04
Files: frontend/src/pages/IdeaWorkspace/index.tsx (detect token, pass readOnly), frontend/src/components/workspace/ReadOnlyBanner.tsx (new), frontend/src/__tests__/read-only-view.test.tsx
Gotchas: useSearchParams for ?token=. Middleware adds 'share_link_viewer' role. Disable ReactFlow: nodesDraggable={false}, nodesConnectable={false}.

test_cases: UI-SHARE.01-02 | Integration | Detect token, hide edit controls

userStories.title: Multi-User Awareness — Sender Names & Co-Owner Rules
userStories.description: As a user in a collaborative idea, I want to see sender names below chat bubbles in multi-user mode and understand co-owner leave constraints.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat messages show sender display_name when collaborators > 0
Single-user ideas do NOT show sender names
Sender name: text-xs, text-muted-foreground, right-aligned for user messages
Co-owner can leave without transfer (co_owner_id set NULL)
Single owner cannot leave (frontend shows tooltip)
userStories.notes:
Design: docs/01-requirements/features.md § F-2.5, F-8.4, docs/03-design/component-specs.md § 5.1 User Message Bubble
Testing: docs/04-test-architecture/test-matrix.md § UI-CHAT.05, T-2.5.01, T-8.4.07
Files: frontend/src/components/chat/UserMessageBubble.tsx (add sender name), frontend/src/components/collaboration/CollaboratorModal.tsx (add Leave button — enhance US-006), frontend/src/__tests__/multi-user-awareness.test.tsx
Gotchas: Multi-user detection: collaborators.length > 0. Batch load users for chat. Leave API from US-002.

test_cases: UI-CHAT.05, T-2.5.01 | Integration/Unit | Sender names multi-user, single-user hides
T-8.4.07 | Unit | Co-owner leave, single owner disabled
